overall.description: A cinematic third-person gameplay sequence from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through a rainy, gas-lit historic street at night. The character approaches a large mansion as lightning flashes in the stormy sky and a horse-drawn carriage passes by.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy historic residential street with high perimeter walls

events.description: horse rider passes by on the right side of the street moving in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet cobblestone street next to a stone perimeter wall

notable_agents.action: rider on horseback galloping past on the right side of the street

entered.detail: tall stone wall with iron fencing on top running along the left side of the street
cast iron gas lamp post emitting warm yellow light
wet cobblestone street surface reflecting the lamp light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow, rainy street lined with a high stone wall on the left and gas lamps on the right. The cobblestones glisten with rain. A horse rider passes by on the right, moving quickly in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: open historic street approaching large mansion with trees

events.description: lightning strike illuminates the sky behind the mansion in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street as the large mansion comes into view ahead

entered.detail: large multi-story historic mansion with lit windows and ornate architecture visible in the distance
tall wooden telegraph pole with crossbars and wires
large oak trees with hanging spanish moss lining the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: The street opens up as the character moves past the stone wall. A large historic mansion becomes visible in the distance, framed by trees with Spanish moss. Lightning suddenly strikes behind the mansion, briefly illuminating the stormy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide approach to mansion with tree-lined cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the illuminated mansion through the rainy street

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the wide, tree-lined street approaching the mansion. The building grows larger in the frame as the distance closes, with the warm lights from its windows cutting through the rainy haze.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage with two horses passes from right to left in front of the mansion

agents.ego_description: approaching the mansion gates as a horse-drawn carriage passes across the path

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver moving from right to left across the street

entered.detail: black wooden carriage with two horses and a driver passing by
ornate iron gates at the entrance to the mansion grounds

segments.scene_description: As the character nears the mansion, a horse-drawn carriage passes from right to left. The ornate iron gates of the mansion become visible, and the building now dominates the view ahead with its detailed facade and glowing windows.

events.description: character passes through the iron gates into the mansion grounds

agents.ego_description: walking through the gates and approaching the mansion entrance steps

entered.detail: stone steps leading up to the mansion's front entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the iron gates into the mansion courtyard. The carriage and street lamps fall behind as the focus shifts to the mansion's grand entrance. The character approaches the stone steps leading to the front door, with the building's ornate architecture now filling the view.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, rain-slicked alleyway toward the imposing facade of a grand historic mansion. It begins along a cobblestone street lined with a high stone wall and glowing gas lamps, as a lone horse rider flashes past in the opposite direction. As the character moves past the wall, the street opens up to reveal a distant mansion framed by Spanish moss, while a sudden strike of lightning briefly illuminates the stormy sky. The scene then expands as the character advances down the wide, tree-lined road, passing a horse-drawn carriage just as the ornate iron gates and the building's glowing windows come into full view. Finally, the camera follows the character through the gates and into the courtyard, shifting focus away from the street lamps to the grand stone steps and detailed architecture of the mansion's entrance.
